race_meta.race_name: Heritage Drives The Goings Always Good Maiden Hurdle (GBB Race)

ruby.title: Probability Analysis
ruby.insight: Model ranked las canals (fr) at position 5 with only 2.0% probability. Top pick was Rebel Tribesman (58.0%). Analysis missed key factors driving the winning horse's form.

keenan.title: Forecast & Distribution
keenan.insight: Top forecast prediction was Rebel Tribesman (IRE) > Liberty Coach, but actual result was Las Canals (FR) > Rebel Tribesman (IRE). Distribution model underestimated variance in placing combinations.

mordin.title: Market Alignment
mordin.insight: Winner Las Canals (FR) showed negative divergence (-6.0%): Model overvalued at 2.0% vs Market 8.0%. Market sentiment more accurate than model.
